# Access Admin API: REST reference

HTTP API specifications generated from protobuf contracts.

## Methods

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [AccessAdminService_ListActions](./AccessAdminService_ListActions.md) | Lists action definitions. |
| [AccessAdminService_CreateAction](./AccessAdminService_CreateAction.md) | Creates a new action definition. |
| [AccessAdminService_UpdateAction](./AccessAdminService_UpdateAction.md) | Updates a mutable action definition. |
| [AccessAdminService_GetAction](./AccessAdminService_GetAction.md) | Returns one action definition by name. |
| [AccessAdminService_DeleteAction](./AccessAdminService_DeleteAction.md) | Deletes an action definition by name. |
| [AccessAdminService_ListResourceTypes](./AccessAdminService_ListResourceTypes.md) | Lists resource type definitions. |
| [AccessAdminService_CreateResourceType](./AccessAdminService_CreateResourceType.md) | Creates a new resource type definition. |
| [AccessAdminService_GetResourceType](./AccessAdminService_GetResourceType.md) | Returns one resource type definition by type. |
| [AccessAdminService_ListRoleBindings](./AccessAdminService_ListRoleBindings.md) | Lists role bindings. |
| [AccessAdminService_CreateRoleBinding](./AccessAdminService_CreateRoleBinding.md) | Creates a role binding. |
| [AccessAdminService_DeleteRoleBinding](./AccessAdminService_DeleteRoleBinding.md) | Deletes a role binding by identifier. |
| [AccessAdminService_SimulateAccess](./AccessAdminService_SimulateAccess.md) | Simulates one access decision and optionally returns a trace. |
